bead.title: FEAT-028: define BlobStore interface in cli/internal/blob/ + migrate attachments & execution evidence
bead.description:
PROBLEM
FEAT-028 (Storage Abstractions, Status: In Progress, P1) names the BlobStore interface as the "first concrete deliverable," but no implementation exists.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-028-storage-abstractions.md:71-89 ("In Scope (v1)") mandates a new cli/internal/blob/ package defining a BlobStore interface, plus migration of two call-site clusters behind it. The package cli/internal/blob/ does not exist (verified: 'ls cli/internal/blob' -> ENOENT). Externalized bead attachments still write directly via cli/internal/bead/attachments.go, and per-attempt execution evidence still writes directly via cli/internal/agent/execute_bead*.go under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/. No open bead tracks this work (2026-06-19 doc/impl alignment audit).

PROPOSED FIX
Create cli/internal/blob/ with the BlobStore interface (methods, error semantics, key conventions, content-addressed vs caller-keyed — exactly as decided in FEAT-028 In-Scope v1), provide LocalFSBlob and MemoryBlob implementations, and migrate (1) externalized bead attachments (attachments.go) and (2) per-attempt execution-evidence writers behind it.

NON-SCOPE
cli/internal/agent/executions_mirror.go stays direct-FS (StreamStore, deferred). Do not migrate cli/internal/registry/. No GC/quota. Do not define EntityStore/StreamStore/ConfigStore (follow-up beads).

DEP NOTE: no deps; orthogonal to the axon Backend epic (TD-027) which abstracts the bead store, not blob state.
bead.acceptance:
1. cli/internal/blob/blob.go defines a BlobStore interface with documented error semantics and key conventions matching FEAT-028 In-Scope v1.
2. LocalFSBlob and MemoryBlob implementations exist with a shared TestBlobStoreConformance covering both.
3. cli/internal/bead/attachments.go writes externalized attachments through BlobStore; existing attachment tests stay green.
4. Per-attempt execution-evidence writers in cli/internal/agent/execute_bead*.go route through BlobStore; on-disk .ddx/executions/<run-id>/ layout unchanged.
5. cli/internal/agent/executions_mirror.go is unchanged (direct FS) with a comment citing the FEAT-028 StreamStore deferral.
6. cd cli && go test ./internal/blob/... ./internal/bead/... ./internal/agent/... green.
7. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
